MULTI_SPRINT_GUIDE_BEGIN
DESIGN=ONE_PLAN_ONE_ISSUE
MODE=DRY_RUN_LOCAL
PLAN_FILE=crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md
PLAN_TITLE=Plan: split-prs fixture plan
FROM_SPRINT=1
TO_SPRINT=2
DRY_RUN_PLAN_ISSUE=999
DRY_RUN_ISSUE_BODY=$AGENT_HOME/out/plan-issue-delivery/duck-plan-plan-issue-body.md
STEP_1=plan-issue-local start-plan --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md <grouping-args> --dry-run
STEP_2=plan-issue-local start-sprint --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --issue 999 --sprint 1 <grouping-args> --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_3=plan-issue-local accept-sprint --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --issue 999 --sprint 1 --approved-comment-url <approval-comment-url-sprint-1> <grouping-args> --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_4=plan-issue-local start-sprint --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --issue 999 --sprint 2 <grouping-args> --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_5=plan-issue-local ready-plan --body-file $AGENT_HOME/out/plan-issue-delivery/duck-plan-plan-issue-body.md --summary Final\ plan\ review --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_6=plan-issue-local close-plan --body-file $AGENT_HOME/out/plan-issue-delivery/duck-plan-plan-issue-body.md --approved-comment-url <final-plan-approval-comment-url> --dry-run
NOTE_DRY_RUN=Dry-run guide is local-only and does not call GitHub.
GROUPING_ARGS_DETERMINISTIC=--pr-grouping <per-sprint\|group> [--strategy deterministic]
GROUPING_ARGS_AUTO=--strategy auto [--default-pr-grouping <per-sprint\|group>]
NOTE_GROUP_MODE_DETERMINISTIC=When using --pr-grouping group with --strategy deterministic, pass --pr-group for every task in the selected scope.
NOTE_GROUP_MODE_AUTO=When using --strategy auto, sprint metadata decides grouping intent and --default-pr-grouping fills metadata gaps.
NOTE_SPRINT_GATE=Before starting sprint N+1, sprint N must be reviewed, merged, and accepted.
NOTE_ACCEPT_SYNC=accept-sprint enforces merged PRs for the sprint and syncs sprint task Status to done.
MULTI_SPRINT_GUIDE_END
